title: betula lenta subsp. uber
intro: Betula lenta subsp. uber, also known as American yellow birch, is a subspecies of the birch tree, characterized by its distinctive yellow bark. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The medicinal properties of American yellow birch include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall health and wellness. American yellow birch can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
